task.original: nicki.code-workspace sync — Wire scripts/generate-code-workspace.sh: run after successful create-worktree.py (start — add folder); run after worktree delete in close-scope (close — remove folder). Warn on regen failure; do not fail create/close. Skip on --dry-run.

history.summary: Worktree was created and task context initialized.
User approved Gherkin story; one Feature with Background and four scenarios for start add, close remove, warn-on-failure, and dry-run skip.

Wrote spec with 5 requirements (start-regen, close-regen, shared-entry-preserved, failure-warning-only, dry-run-skip). Scope in wiring regeneration into start and close; scope out worktree naming, check-gate, rewriting script rules, new deps.
Revised spec per user YAGNI guidance — reuse existing generate-code-workspace.sh as-is (not replace); one-liner requirements; dropped shared-entry-preserved; scope out excludes modifying script.

Wrote 11 subtasks wiring regen into create-worktree.py (start, dry-run skip, warn-on-failure) and close-scope (post-teardown, warn-on-failure), plus acceptance verification. Reuse existing scripts/generate-code-workspace.sh as-is.

Revised spec — regen script may be simplified when wiring (YAGNI, not frozen as-is); regen-script requirement replaces reuse-existing-script; scope in includes simplification; output semantics preserved (Shared + one folder per git worktree).

Revised subtasks for regen-script simplification during wiring — single entry point, may simplify where needed; output semantics preserved (Shared + one folder per git worktree); wiring lines unchanged.

Wrote execution handoff and updated subtask checkmarks. Implementation subtasks 1–6 and verification 10–11 done; E2E verification subtasks 7–9 remain pending. Changes: scripts/generate-code-workspace.sh restored; create-worktree.py wired regen (skip dry-run, warn on failure); close-scope/SKILL.md documents post-teardown regen.

Review complete — wiring and start E2E pass (3 test worktrees created, workspace updated). fix_required: close E2E (subtask 8) and failure-path E2E (subtask 9) not demonstrated. ## Fix appended to subtasks.

Fix round complete — close E2E passed (3 test worktrees torn down, regen dropped entries, git worktree prune). Regen-failure E2E passed (start warn-only with worktree created; close teardown not rolled back). All subtasks 7–9 and fix items marked done. Execution status complete.
Post-fix review approved. Close E2E and regen-failure E2E satisfy prior r1 verify blockers. All requirements and subtasks verified. readiness.status ready_for_acceptance.
Simplified scripts/generate-code-workspace.sh — 32-line Python heredoc to 5-line script with python3 -c one-liner. Semantics preserved. Verified exit 0.
r3 review after script simplification — 5-line python3 -c one-liner preserves output semantics; verify rerun passed. ready_for_acceptance.
User accepted at ready_for_acceptance with explicit request for full pipeline through close (sync, integrate, close).
